ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a biography see G. Morelli, `Sebastiano Baldini`, in Strenna dei romanisti, (1978), pp. 262-68. More recently, his profile is discussed in Aspects of the Secular Cantata in Late Baroque Italy, ed. Michael Talbot (2009).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
